name: Balanced Gut Probiotics
shortDescription: Easy digestion, firm stools, and a settled stomach at every mealtime — the daily scoop that keeps your dog's gut running right. A 5-billion-CFU blend of living probiotic cultures plus prebiotic fiber to feed them, supporting normal digestion and helping maintain a balanced gut.

name: Immunity Mushroom Complex
shortDescription: Year-round resilience for the dog who never takes a day off. Turkey tail, reishi, and shiitake mushrooms in one hearty daily blend, formulated to support a strong, healthy immune system through every season.

name: Joint & Mobility
shortDescription: Long walks, stairs taken at a run, and healthy joints at every age. Glucosamine, turmeric root, and green-lipped mussel work together to support joint health and help maintain flexibility and easy movement for life.

name: Foundational Health Daily
shortDescription: One scoop covers the bases: a whole-food daily multivitamin that supports a glossy coat, steady energy, healthy digestion, and overall vitality from nose to tail. Available in Adult and Puppy formulas.

name: Paw Saver
shortDescription: Tough, supple pads that are ready for anything — gravel, salt, sand, and trail. Daily conditioning care that helps maintain healthy, resilient paws through every season.

name: Pumpkin Power
shortDescription: Smooth digestion and regularity you can count on, every single day. A pumpkin-forward fiber blend that supports normal digestion and helps keep your dog comfortably on schedule.

name: Recovery & Hydration
shortDescription: Bounce-back for hard play, long hikes, and hot days. A balanced electrolyte formula that supports normal hydration and healthy recovery, so your dog is ready to go again tomorrow.
